content: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch loaders.py only.

agent2: I'm adding path_transform param to ALL loaders in loaders.py including FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source, plus DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Since we both touch FileSystemLoader.__init__ and get_source, let's minimize collision: I'll add path_transform as the LAST kwarg in __init__ signatures and only add a single 'if self.path_transform' transform line at the top of get_source (before existing logic), not restructuring the method body. Please add your fallback_searchpath param before mine (earlier in signature) and touch get_source/list_templates for your own logic; I'll rebase around whatever you land. Will check back before finalizing.

agent2: confirmed our repos are isolated copies — your fallback_searchpath changes don't show up in my file, so no clobbering risk. My path_transform work is done across all loaders (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader), all tests pass. Finalizing my patch now.
